km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester於1510年出生在英國。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1599年在他的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester于1510年出生在英国。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1599年在他的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German trester ‘sediment from the pressing or fermentation of grapes and from beer brewing’ (from trestern ‘to press grapes’), presumably a nickname for a worthless person.

variants.name: Traster
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German   Trester   or   Traister  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester was born in 1510, in England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1599, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester est né en 1510, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1599, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester wurde 1510 in England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1599 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester è nato il nel 1510 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1599, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thesterは1510年にイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1599年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester(은)는 1510년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester nasceu em 1510, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1599, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester родился в 1510 г. в местности Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1599 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Nicolas Thester nació en 1510, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1599, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
